description: Template for analyzing company strategic responses to crises, product issues, financing stress, or reputation shocks.

starter_sources.description: earnings calls, investor day remarks, public executive statements
sell-side notes, major press coverage, customer or supplier disclosures

ingestion_priorities: leadership response analogs from prior company crises
freshness_notes: Current filings and management statements generally dominate older materials. Historical crisis analogs remain useful for executive style and board behavior.
